pi_items.source: Task description and nature of operations (Rancher/Kubernetes configuration)
setup_task.sh creates this exact file path
setup_task.sh patches deployments in the 'staging' namespace
setup_task.sh writes these exact values to priority_tier_spec.yaml
setup_task.sh writes these exact assignments to priority_tier_spec.yaml
Default threshold setting, though unscorable due to missing verifier.py

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for rancher_env priority_preemption_configuration task by confirming that the priority_tier_spec.yaml file is synthetically generated via setup_task.sh and dropped on the desktop. The target namespace 'staging', priority classes (platform-critical: 1000000, business-critical: 750000, standard: 500000, batch-low: 100000), and workload assignments (redis-primary: business-critical, nginx-web: standard) perfectly match the instructions in the task description and the generated yaml spec. Additionally, discovered that the task is defective because 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, making the task programmatically unscorable.
